title: Chabrias Ltd Kitchen Shaker Dredger 3 Interchangeable Lids– Multi-Use BPA-Free Plastic Shaker with & Dual Measurement Marks (ML & Oz) – Ideal for Dusting, Decorating, and Baking
features: Multi-Functional Kitchen Tool: Perfect for dusting flour, icing sugar, cocoa powder, and more. A must-have for baking, decorating, and working with pastry.
3 Interchangeable Lids: Comes with three unique lids for different types of dusting and pouring—fine, medium, and coarse—allowing full control over your ingredients.
Easy Measurement Reference: Features clear, dual-scale measurements in both milliliters (ML) and ounces (Oz) printed on the side for accurate usage every time.
Food-Safe & BPA-Free: Made from high-quality BPA-free plastic, ensuring safe use with all your freshly baked goods and dry ingredients.
Durable & Dishwasher Safe: Built for repeated use in busy kitchens—sturdy construction and easy to clean, just pop it in the dishwasher after use.
description: Multi-Functional Kitchen Tool: Perfect for dusting flour, icing sugar, cocoa powder, and more. A must-have for baking, decorating, and working with pastry. 3 Interchangeable Lids: Comes with three unique lids for different types of dusting and pouring—fine, medium, and coarse—allowing full control over your ingredients. Easy Measurement Reference: Features clear, dual-scale measurements in both milliliters (ML) and ounces (Oz) printed on the side for accurate usage every time. Food-Safe & BPA-Free: Made from high-quality BPA-free plastic, ensuring safe use with all your freshly baked goods and dry ingredients. Durable & Dishwasher Safe: Built for repeated use in busy kitchens—sturdy construction and easy to clean, just pop it in the dishwasher after use. Elevate your baking experience with the Chabrias Ltd Kitchen Shaker Dredger, a versatile tool designed for both professional chefs and home bakers. Whether you're dusting flour onto your pastry board, adding a light layer of cocoa to your tiramisu, or sprinkling powdered sugar over a freshly baked cake, this shaker is your ideal companion. Crafted from BPA-free plastic, it ensures your ingredients stay safe and uncontaminated. The transparent container is marked with dual measurements (in ML and Oz), helping you portion with precision and confidence. The set includes three interchangeable lids—fine mesh for powdered sugar, medium holes for flour, and coarse openings for herbs or decorations—making it a one-stop solution for countless culinary needs. Practical, hygienic, and easy to clean, the Chabrias Kitchen Shaker Dredger is the perfect accessory for every kitchen—from casual baking sessions to professional pastry prep.
